subject: English
chapter: A Tale of Valour: Major Somnath Sharma and the Battle of Badgam

activities_projects.title: Leadership Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Critically analyse the leadership qualities of Major Somnath Sharma
steps: Read the chapter carefully and identify moments where Major Somnath Sharma showed leadership
Analyse how his leadership influenced the actions of the soldiers
Compare his leadership style with modern leadership principles
Write a detailed case study describing his leadership approach
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical thinking and leadership analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and supporting evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Battle Strategy Report
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the military strategy used during the Battle of Badgam
steps: Study the description of the battle in the chapter
Identify the strategic importance of Badgam and Srinagar
Analyse the challenges faced by the Indian soldiers
Prepare a report explaining how Major Somnath Sharma's decisions influenced the outcome
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand strategic thinking and military decision-making
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of analysis and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Research Project
activities_projects.objective: Investigate the historical background of the 1947 Indo-Pakistan conflict
steps: Research Operation Gulmarg and the invasion of Kashmir
Identify key historical events that led to the Battle of Badgam
Write a research report summarising these events
Present the report with visuals such as maps or timelines
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect literary narratives with historical research
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Ethics and Duty Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Analyse ethical values such as duty, sacrifice, and patriotism
steps: Identify examples of sacrifice and duty from the story
Discuss whether duty to the nation should come before personal safety
Write your viewpoint supported with examples from the chapter
Share and debate your viewpoints in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop ethical reasoning and reflective thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and supporting examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Gallantry Awards
steps: Research the Param Vir Chakra, Maha Vir Chakra, and Vir Chakra
Compare their eligibility criteria and significance
Identify notable recipients of each award
Prepare a comparative chart explaining their differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain deeper understanding of national honours and military recognition
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and clarity of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Critical Vocabulary Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret powerful vocabulary used in the chapter
steps: Identify strong descriptive words such as 'tenacity', 'resolute', and 'unparalleled'
Analyse how these words influence the tone of the narrative
Rewrite a short paragraph of the story using simpler vocabulary
Compare how the tone changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of vocabulary in shaping narrative tone

activities_projects.title: Geographical Strategy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of geography in military conflicts
steps: Locate Srinagar, Badgam, and the Kashmir Valley on a map
Study the terrain of the region
Explain how geography influenced the battle strategy
Write a short analysis on the importance of terrain in warfare
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students link geography with historical and strategic analysis

activities_projects.title: Documentary Presentation
activities_projects.objective: Create a visual presentation about Major Somnath Sharma
steps: Research the life and achievements of Major Somnath Sharma
Collect images, quotes, and key events from his life
Create a presentation or poster documentary
Present your documentary to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop research and multimedia presentation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, accuracy, and presentation quality (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Patriotism Debate
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group argues that patriotism is the highest duty of a citizen
The other group argues that personal safety should come first
Conduct a structured debate and summarise key arguments
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students practice critical thinking and persuasive communication

activities_projects.title: Analytical Essay on Sacrifice
steps: Write an essay analysing the meaning of sacrifice in the story
Discuss how the soldiers' actions protected the nation
Relate the concept of sacrifice to modern society
Conclude with your interpretation of the chapter’s message
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop higher-order thinking and analytical writing abilities
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of insight, organisation, and language usage (10 marks)
